message:
release: bump to v0.3.3

Rolls up two user-facing bugfixes from #190, #191:

- fix(sources/doctor): correct ssh argv so remote path probe evaluates
- fix(sources/sync): detect renamed rsync --secluded-args on Homebrew 3.4.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.3.2"
+version = "0.3.3"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
